lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਨੁ ਰੰਗਿਆ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad man rangiaa liv laae |
lines.english: The mind is attuned to the Word of the Shabad; it is lovingly attuned to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nij ghar vasiaa prabh kee rajaae |1|
lines.english: It abides within its own home, in harmony with the Lord's Will. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਜਾਇ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seviai jaae abhimaan |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, egotistical pride departs,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਜਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਭਉ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man bairaagee jaa sabad bhau khaae |
lines.english: The mind becomes detached and free of desire, when it experiences the Fear of God, through the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: govid paaeeai gunee nidhaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and the Lord of the Universe, the Treasure of Excellence, is obtained. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਸਭ ਤੈ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh niramalaa sabh tai rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: My Immaculate God is pervading and contained among all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਾਸਨ ਕੋ ਦਾਸੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har daasan ko daas sukh paae |
lines.english: The slave of the Lord's slave attains peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te milai milaae |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one is united in His Union. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: meraa har prabh in bidh paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: My Lord God is found in this way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਰਾਮ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har kirapaa te raam gun gaae |3|
lines.english: By the Grace of the Lord, one comes to sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਬਹੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig bahu jeevan jit har naam na lagai piaar |
lines.english: Cursed is that long life, during which love for the Lord's Name is not enshrined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਸੇਜ ਸੁਖਾਲੀ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਮੋਹ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig sej sukhaalee kaaman moh gubaar |
lines.english: Cursed is that comfortable bed which lures one into the darkness of attachment to sexual desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਸਫਲੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਜਿਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: tin safal janam jin naam adhaar |4|
lines.english: Fruitful is the birth of that person who takes the Support of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਹਮਾਰਾ ਮੀਤੁ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: soee hamaaraa meet jo har gun gaavai soe |
lines.english: He alone is my friend, who sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig dhrig grihu kuttanb jit har preet na hoe |
lines.english: Cursed, cursed is that home and family, in which the love of the Lord is not embraced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਦੂਖੁ ਸਗਲ ਮਿਟਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har naam dhiaaeaa dookh sagal mittaaee |
lines.english: I have meditated on the Name of the Lord, and all my sufferings have been erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਮੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: har naam binaa mai avar na koe |5|
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, there is no other for me. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਹਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te ham gat pat paaee |
lines.english: From the True Guru, I have obtained salvation and honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਹਮ ਕਉ ਸਰੀਰ ਸੁਧਿ ਭਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur miliai ham kau sareer sudh bhee |
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, I came to understand my body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand har naam liv laaee |6|
lines.english: I am in constant bliss, lovingly attuned to the Lord's Name. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਸੇ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਖਿਮਾ ਗਹਿ ਲਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: binase krodh khimaa geh lee |7|
lines.english: Anger has been dispelled, and I have grasped hold of tolerance. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har aape kripaa kare naam devai |
lines.english: The Lord Himself showers His Mercy, and bestows the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਸਭ ਅਗਨਿ ਬੁਝਈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai trisanaa sabh agan bujhee |
lines.english: The fires of ego and desire have been totally quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਤਨੁ ਕੋ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਲੇਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh ratan ko viralaa levai |
lines.english: How rare is that Gurmukh, who receives the jewel of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਅਲਖ ਅਭੇਵੈ ॥੮॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak gun gaavai har alakh abhevai |8|8|
lines.english: O Nanak, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, the Unknowable, the Incomprehensible. ||8||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree bairaagan mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Raag Gauree Bairaagan, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਜੋ ਮੁਹ ਫੇਰੇ ਤੇ ਵੇਮੁਖ ਬੁਰੇ ਦਿਸੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te jo muh fere te vemukh bure disan |
lines.english: Those who turn their faces away from the True Guru, are seen to be unfaithful and evil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਾਇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹਰਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat melaae prabh har hiradai har gun saar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Lord God, please lead me to meet the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, that I may dwell upon the Glorious Praises of the Lord within my heart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਬਧੇ ਮਾਰੀਅਨਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਵੇਲਾ ਨਾ ਲਹੰਨਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anadin badhe maareean fir velaa naa lahan |1|
lines.english: They shall be bound and beaten night and day; they shall not have this opportunity again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har har raakhahu kripaa dhaar |
lines.english: O Lord, please shower Your Mercy upon me, and save me!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਭਗਤ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵਦੇ ਜੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਾਇ ਚਲੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: se bhagat har bhaavade jo guramukh bhaae chalan |
lines.english: Those devotees are pleasing to the Lord, who as Gurmukh, walk in harmony with the Way of the Lord's Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਨਿ ਜੀਵਤ ਮੁਏ ਰਹੰਨਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aap chhodd sevaa karan jeevat mue rahan |2|
lines.english: Subduing their selfishness and conceit, and performing selfless service, they remain dead while yet alive. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਕਿਉ ਮਨਹੁ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਰਖੀਐ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ohu kiau manahu visaareeai har rakheeai hiradai dhaar |3|
lines.english: Why forget Him from your mind? Keep the Lord enshrined in your heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਦਾ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਪਰਾਣ ਹੈ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jis daa pindd paraan hai tis kee sir kaar |
lines.english: The body and the breath of life belong to the One - perform the greatest service to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਮਿ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam miliai pat paaeeai naam maniai sukh hoe |
lines.english: Receiving the Naam, the Name of the Lord, one obtains honor; believing in the Naam, one is at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਜੋ ਮੁਹੁ ਫੇਰੇ ਓਇ ਭ੍ਰਮਦੇ ਨਾ ਟਿਕੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te jo muhu fere oe bhramade naa ttikan |
lines.english: They turn their faces away from the True Guru; they continue to wander aimlessly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: satigur te naam paaeeai karam milai prabh soe |4|
lines.english: The Naam is obtained from the True Guru; by His Grace, God is found. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਤਿ ਅਸਮਾਨੁ ਨ ਝਲਈ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਿਸਟਾ ਪਏ ਪਚੰਨਿ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: dharat asamaan na jhalee vich visattaa pe pachan |5|
lines.english: They are not accepted by the earth or the sky; they fall into manure, and rot. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਠਗਉਲੀ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jag bharam bhulaaeaa moh tthgaulee paae |
lines.english: This world is deluded by doubt - it has taken the drug of emotional attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਸੋ ਸੋਹਣੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sevan so sohane haumai mail gavaae |
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru are very beautiful; they cast off the filth of selfishness and conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਭਿਟੈ ਮਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jinaa satigur bhettiaa tin nerr na bhittai maae |6|
lines.english: Maya does not draw near those who have met with the True Guru. ||6||
